transcript_facts:
*   The patient reports knee pain following moving boxes over the weekend.
*   The patient reports equal pain in both knees.
*   The patient reports past knee problems.
*   The patient reports occasional elbow pain.
*   The patient denies fever or chills.
*   The patient denies headaches.
*   The clinician suspects an acute exacerbation of arthritis in the right knee.
*   The clinician prescribes ultram 50 milligrams every six hours as needed.
*   The clinician orders an autoimmune panel.
*   The clinician recommends the patient take it easy.
*   The clinician orders thyroid labs.
*   The clinician plans to continue synthroid.
